name: Soil Health Card Scheme
benefit: Free soil testing + crop-wise fertilizer recommendation
benefit_hindi: Free mitti ki jaanch + fasal ke hisaab se khad ki salaah
documents_required: No formal application needed — government collects samples

steps: Contact your local Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK)
Government officials collect soil samples from your field
Testing done in soil testing labs
Soil Health Card delivered with recommendations
Follow fertilizer recommendations to save money and improve yield
steps_hindi: Local Krishi Vigyan Kendra se sampark karein
Government ki team aapke khet se mitti ka sample legi
Soil Health Card milega jismein salaah likhi hogi
Card ke hisaab se khad dalein — paisa bachega aur fasal acchi hogi

hindi_summary: Soil Health Card mein aapki mitti ki free jaanch hoti hai. Card mein likha hota hai ki kaunsi fasal ke liye kitni aur kaunsi khad daalni chahiye. Isse fasal acchi hoti hai aur khad ka kharcha kam hota hai. Local agriculture office se sampark karein.
